requirement_topic.en: ENATREL Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ENATREL BESS并网——60 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ENATREL BESS併網——60 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: ENATREL (Empresa Nacional de Transmisión Eléctrica) is Nicaragua's national electricity transmission company and the entity responsible for grid-connection approval for generation and storage assets connected to the Sistema Interconectado Nacional (SIN). INE (Instituto Nicaragüense de Energía) is the electricity-sector regulator that grants generation and commercialisation licences under the Ley de la Industria Eléctrica (Law 272, as amended). MEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) sets national energy policy and approves large-scale energy projects. Grid-connected BESS installations require ENATREL technical connection approval, an INE operating licence, and MEM project authorisation for utility-scale assets. Nicaragua is also connected to the SIEPAC (Sistema de Interconexión Eléctrica de los Países de América Central) regional grid, and cross-border interconnection adds regional dispatch coordination requirements. Nicaragua's grid operates at 60 Hz and nominally 120/240 V (single-phase residential split-phase) or 120/208 V (three-phase), with medium-voltage distribution at 7.6 kV / 13.2 kV / 24.9 kV. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Nicaragua's 60 Hz grid. A publicly accessible ENATREL technical specification document specifically for utility-scale BESS grid connection had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ENATREL.
summary.zh: ENATREL（尼加拉瓜国家电力传输公司）是尼加拉瓜国家电力传输公司，负责接入国家互联电力系统（SIN）的发电和储能资产的并网审批。INE（尼加拉瓜能源研究院）是电力行业监管机构，依据《电力行业法》（第272号法律及修正案）颁发发电和商业化许可证。MEM（能源和矿业部）制定国家能源政策并审批大规模能源项目。并网BESS装置须取得ENATREL技术并网批准、INE运营许可证及MEM对公用事业规模资产的项目授权。尼加拉瓜还接入SIEPAC（中美洲电力互联系统）区域电网，跨境互联增加了区域调度协调要求。尼加拉瓜电网运行于60 Hz，标称电压为120/240 V（单相民用分相）或120/208 V（三相），中压配电为7.6 kV / 13.2 kV / 24.9 kV。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对尼加拉瓜60 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认ENATREL公开发布专门针对公用事业规模BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ENATREL获取。
summary.zht: ENATREL（尼加拉瓜國家電力傳輸公司）是尼加拉瓜國家電力傳輸公司，負責接入國家互聯電力系統（SIN）的發電和儲能資產的併網審批。INE（尼加拉瓜能源研究院）是電力行業監管機構，依據《電力行業法》（第272號法律及修正案）頒發發電和商業化許可證。MEM（能源和礦業部）制定國家能源政策並審批大規模能源項目。併網BESS裝置須取得ENATREL技術併網批准、INE運營許可證及MEM對公用事業規模資產的項目授權。尼加拉瓜還接入SIEPAC（中美洲電力互聯系統）區域電網，跨境互聯增加了區域調度協調要求。尼加拉瓜電網運行於60 Hz，標稱電壓為120/240 V（單相民用分相）或120/208 V（三相），中壓配電為7.6 kV / 13.2 kV / 24.9 kV。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對尼加拉瓜60 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認ENATREL公開發布專門針對公用事業規模BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ENATREL獲取。

standards_or_laws: Ley de la Industria Eléctrica — Law 272 (as amended) — Nicaragua's electricity sector law governing INE licensing and ENATREL grid access
ENATREL — Empresa Nacional de Transmisión Eléctrica — grid-connection approval authority for assets connected to the SIN
INE — Instituto Nicaragüense de Energía — electricity-sector regulator; operating licences required for BESS commercialisation
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
SIEPAC — Sistema de Interconexión Eléctrica de los Países de América Central — regional grid interconnection affecting dispatch coordination requirements

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Nicaragua's grid operates at 60 Hz, 120/240 V or 120/208 V — a fundamental frequency and voltage difference that requires BESS PCS hardware reconfiguration, firmware reprogramming (protection relay settings, anti-islanding, frequency ride-through), and full revalidation. Chinese GB/T and NB/T standards are also 50 Hz-based and do not substitute for IEC 62933 or ENATREL-referenced evidence.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行于50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。尼加拉瓜电网运行于60 Hz、120/240 V或120/208 V——这是根本性的频率和电压差异，须对BESS储能变流器硬件进行重新配置、固件重新编程（保护继电器整定、防孤岛、频率穿越）并进行全面重新验证。中国GB/T和NB/T标准同样基于50 Hz，不可替代IEC 62933或ENATREL引用证据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行於50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。尼加拉瓜電網運行於60 Hz、120/240 V或120/208 V——這是根本性的頻率和電壓差異，須對BESS儲能變流器硬件進行重新配置、韌體重新編程（保護繼電器整定、防孤島、頻率穿越）並進行全面重新驗證。中國GB/T和NB/T標準同樣基於50 Hz，不可替代IEC 62933或ENATREL引用證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; 50 Hz-based)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network; 50 Hz-based)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters; 50 Hz-based)

gap.en: Gap: The most significant technical gap is grid frequency and voltage. Nicaragua operates at 60 Hz / 120–240 V; China's grid-validated BESS PCS operates at 50 Hz / 220–380 V. This is not a documentation gap — it is a hardware and firmware engineering gap requiring: (a) PCS hardware capable of operating at 60 Hz (many Chinese inverters support 50/60 Hz dual-frequency but this must be confirmed with the manufacturer and revalidated); (b) full firmware reprogramming of protection relay thresholds, frequency ride-through profiles, anti-islanding detection, and reactive power control settings for 60 Hz operation; (c) retesting and recommissioning under ENATREL requirements before grid connection. Additional documentation gaps: (d) Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and NB/T 42090-2016 certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ENATREL grid-connection requirements — engage ENATREL at the earliest project stage to obtain technical connection requirements; (e) IEC 62933 series compliance evidence — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; (f) confirm SCADA/communication interface protocols required by ENATREL for BESS monitoring; (g) obtain INE operating licence and MEM project authorisation before installation.
gap.zh: 差距：最重要的技术差距是电网频率和电压。尼加拉瓜运行于60 Hz / 120–240 V；中国电网验证的BESS储能变流器运行于50 Hz / 220–380 V。这不是文件差距，而是需要以下措施的硬件和固件工程差距：（a）能够在60 Hz运行的储能变流器硬件（许多中国逆变器支持50/60 Hz双频，但须向制造商确认并重新验证）；（b）针对60 Hz运行对保护继电器阈值、频率穿越曲线、防孤岛检测和无功功率控制设置进行全面固件重编程；（c）在并网前按ENATREL要求重新测试和调试。其他文件差距：（d）中国GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016证书及NEA审批不满足ENATREL并网要求——应在项目最早阶段与ENATREL接触以获取技术并网要求；（e）IEC 62933系列合规证据——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；（f）确认ENATREL对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议；（g）在安装前取得INE运营许可证及MEM项目授权。
gap.zht: 差距：最重要的技術差距是電網頻率和電壓。尼加拉瓜運行於60 Hz / 120–240 V；中國電網驗證的BESS儲能變流器運行於50 Hz / 220–380 V。這不是文件差距，而是需要以下措施的硬件和韌體工程差距：（a）能夠在60 Hz運行的儲能變流器硬件（許多中國逆變器支持50/60 Hz雙頻，但須向製造商確認並重新驗證）；（b）針對60 Hz運行對保護繼電器閾值、頻率穿越曲線、防孤島檢測和無功功率控制設置進行全面韌體重編程；（c）在併網前按ENATREL要求重新測試和調試。其他文件差距：（d）中國GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016證書及NEA審批不滿足ENATREL併網要求——應在項目最早階段與ENATREL接觸以獲取技術併網要求；（e）IEC 62933系列合規證據——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；（f）確認ENATREL對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議；（g）在安裝前取得INE運營許可證及MEM項目授權。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ENATREL grid-connection approval and INE operating licence are required for grid-connected BESS in Nicaragua; MEM project authorisation required for utility-scale assets; Chinese GB/T certificates are not transferable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; based on 50 Hz and not transferable to Nicaragua's 60 Hz grid

source.publisher: ENATREL — Empresa Nacional de Transmisión Eléctrica (Nicaragua)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy ENATREL's Nicaragua grid-connection requirements. The primary barrier is a fundamental grid frequency and voltage difference: Nicaragua operates at 60 Hz / 120–240 V versus China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V — BESS PCS requires hardware confirmation, full firmware reconfiguration, and revalidation for 60 Hz operation before any grid-connection testing. Engage ENATREL, INE, and MEM at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and licensing obligations. No publicly accessible ENATREL BESS-specific technical specification has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement is essential before equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足ENATREL尼加拉瓜并网要求。主要障碍是根本性的电网频率和电压差异：尼加拉瓜运行于60 Hz / 120–240 V，而中国为50 Hz / 220–380 V——在任何并网测试前，BESS储能变流器须经硬件确认、全面固件重新配置并针对60 Hz运行重新验证。应在项目最早阶段与ENATREL、INE和MEM接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及许可义务。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ENATREL公开发布BESS专项技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足ENATREL尼加拉瓜併網要求。主要障礙是根本性的電網頻率和電壓差異：尼加拉瓜運行於60 Hz / 120–240 V，而中國為50 Hz / 220–380 V——在任何併網測試前，BESS儲能變流器須經硬件確認、全面韌體重新配置並針對60 Hz運行重新驗證。應在項目最早階段與ENATREL、INE和MEM接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及許可義務。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ENATREL公開發布BESS專項技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接接觸至關重要。
